form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished fourth over 450m at Maitland, beaten 9 lengths (25.75) behind Mojave in a Grade 5 on March 30. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished fourth over 450m at Maitland, beaten 9 lengths (25.75) behind Mojave in a Grade 5 on March 30. Should be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was forced wide by contact in the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 520m at Nowra, beaten 9 lengths (30.37) behind Blue Linkin in a Grade 4/5 on March 16. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Richmond over 320m. Last start finished 3rd on March 27 over 320m at Richmond behind Good Odds Comet beaten 2.25 lengths (18.36) in a Grade 5. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Nowra to win by 0.8 lengths in 21.02, beating Kung Fu Bay. Last start finished 5th over 520m at Nowra beaten 7 lengths (30.74) behind Any More Coins in a Grade 5 on August 4. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 1 over 401m at Richmond in a Grade 5. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 1 over 401m at Richmond in a Grade 5. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.87) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Nowra over 365m (20.83) beating Rivendell in Grade 4/5 on April 2. In winning form and must be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 472m in 26.85. Followed that up with a minor placing over 472m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Not suited by wide draw, no easier here so may struggle.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 365m at Nowra behind Angry Friendship beaten 10 lengths (21.62). Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (30.49) over 520m at Richmond. Has found a suitable race to launch this campaign.
